title: An Ordinance Prohibiting Any Person From Committing Any Act Which Causes Stigma, Disgrace, Shame, Humiliation, Harrassment or Otherwise Discrimination Against a Person Belonging to Suspect, Probable and Confirmed Cases of Coronavirus Disease 2019 (COVID-19) Including Their Family Members and Against Frontline Workers. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MIKE DEXTER A. CONCIO; CO-AUTHORS: COUNCILOR(S) Josephine S. Evangelista, Miko C. Pelegrina, Geronimo A. Ciceron, Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Mark Lester B. Dizon, Cris
